detail.instructions: Define RegisterUserDto with public email and display_name Option<String> fields, and derive serde::Deserialize so JSON boundary input can create it directly.
detail.starterCode: // TODO: define the raw adapter DTO for registering a user.

files.content: // TODO: define the raw adapter DTO for registering a user.

hints.body: DTOs model transport input, so public fields are acceptable at the boundary.
Option<String> lets serde represent missing JSON fields as None.
Derive Deserialize on the DTO, not on the domain command.

detail.completionExplanation: The adapter DTO can now be built from JSON while still keeping untrusted boundary data separate from validated domain data.
